cost_policy: 6.0 bps per leg, applied on turnover
provenance: Reconciled from code (src/research/tsm_trend.py defaults + include_funding=True) and validation artifacts (TSM-009..015 primary stream). Managed-vol overlay + ERC excluded from the core per artifact evidence, not report naming.
signal_definition: sign of the 28d (672h) trailing log-price change per symbol; long if positive, short if negative
universe_policy: deployment universe = original 20 liquid Binance USDM perps; generalization validated across thematic/liquidity universes with FIXED params (zero re-tune)

managed_vol_overlay.note: Moreira-Muir managed-vol overlay (window=12 rebalances, cap=3.0) is NOT in the canonical core; it belongs to combined-caveated.

weighting: per-leg inverse realized-volatility (7d), signed by the 28d trend, normalized to unit gross exposure across the long/short book
